description: Style Note Carry your essentials conveniently in these wallets from fossil. Crafted from genuine leather,  these wallets can be paired with any outfit and can become a fashion accessory! So, enhance your style with this fashionable, yet spacious wallet from Fossil.  Product Details Two-toned leather wallet with fabric tape and metal eyelets on the front  Three-fold wallet with two main compartments Has six card slots, five insert pockets, an id card holder and one buttoned pocket on the right to carry coins Branding embossed on the front Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a damp cloth to remove dust Size Dimensions: 12.5 cm x 9 cm
